title: Better Ore Borders
description: Adds Emissive and Connected Ore Boarders!
body:
# **Better Ore Borders**
This is a modern ore borders Resource Pack that stays true to the Vanila experience of Minecraft.

This Pack does mainly depend on Optifine's CTM format, although if you don't care for Connected or Emissive Textures its not required to function.

[Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) is a fabric based Mod that allows for Optifine's CTM format, this Resource Pack also works with this mod in mind.

## Features
- Vanila Ore Boarders
- Connected Textures (Requires Optifine/Continuity)
- Emissive Textures (Requires Optifine/Continuity)
